BackstoryDef.title: Republic Clone
BackstoryDef.description: Engineered in the sterile halls of Kamino and trained from decanting, this soldier was designed for one purpose: war. Accelerated growth and relentless drills forged them into a disciplined warrior, proficient in firearms, tactics, and unit cohesion. However, their education was strictly martial—leaving little room for creativity or civilian skills.

BackstoryDef.title: Republic Trooper
BackstoryDef.description: Deployed across the battlefields of the Clone Wars, this soldier has seen combat on a hundred worlds. Whether holding the line against droid armies or executing precision strikes under Jedi command, they are a hardened veteran of the Grand Army of the Republic. While unmatched in warfare, their life outside the military is almost nonexistent.
